annotations.annotation: Regulations .01—.06 adopted as an emergency provision effective October 13, 2010 (37:23 Md. R. 1607); adopted permanently effective December 27, 2010 (37:26 Md. R. 1789)
Regulation .03D adopted as an emergency provision effective November 14, 2011 (38:25 Md. R. 1579); adopted permanently effective January 23, 2012 (39:1 Md. R. 20)
Chapter repealed as an emergency provision effective March 1, 2013 (40:7 Md. R. 608)
